name: Maestro.Scale

unions.name: Mode
unions.comment: Mode represents the mode of a scale.

aliases.name: Scale
aliases.comment: Scale represents a list of tones composing it

values.name: scale

name: Maestro.Interval

unions.name: Interval
unions.comment: Interval represents the difference between two pitches

values.name: addInterval
values.comment:
addInterval applies an interval to a given note, and returns
the resulting note

values.name: diatonicDegreeOf
values.comment:
diatonicDegreeOf will compute the note being the given
degree of a starting note on the diatonic scale

values.name: distance
values.comment: distance computes the distance in semitones between two notes

values.name: majorIntervals
values.comment:
majorIntervals represents the sequence of intervals composing
the Major scale

values.name: minorIntervals
values.comment:
minorIntervals represents the sequence of intervals composing
the minor scale

name: Maestro.Note

aliases.name: Note
aliases.comment: Note represents a tone on a given octave

aliases.name: Octave
aliases.comment: Octave represents an octave number, as represented in piano or MIDI notation

values.name: newNote
values.comment: newNote is a helper function to create a note

values.name: noteToIndex
values.comment: noteToIndex returns the MIDI value of a given note

name: Maestro
Maestro.Tone
comment:
This module provides types and functions to manipulate musical tones.
It allows you to represent tones (pitches) like `C`, `C Sharp` and so on, as
well as helpers to represent these as numerical values.

# Types
@docs Tone, Key, Adjustment

# Common Helpers
@docs newTone, keyToValue, keyFromValue, diatonicKeyValue, diatonicKeyFromValue,
      adjustmentFromValue, adjustmentToValue

unions.name: Adjustment
unions.comment: Adjustment represents an adjustment applied to a key

unions.name: Key
unions.comment: Key represents a Pitch class without adjustment

aliases.name: Tone
aliases.comment: Tone represents a pitch and is defined by a key and an adjustment

values.name: adjustmentFromValue
values.comment:
adjustmentFromValue returns the adjustment corresponding to a given
number of semitones

values.name: adjustmentToValue
values.comment:
adjustmentToValue returns the numbers of semitones to apply to a
Key when calculating its position.

values.name: diatonicKeyFromValue
values.comment:
diatonicKeyFromValue given a position relative to an octave
(composed of only natural notes (white notes of your piano)) returns the
corresponding key.

values.name: diatonicKeyValue
values.comment:
diatonicKeyValue returns the diatonic position of a Key relative to an octave
(composed of only natural notes (white notes of your piano)) as a numeric value.

values.name: keyFromValue
values.comment:
keyFromValue given a position relative to an octave returns the
corresponding key

values.name: keyToValue
values.comment:
keyToValue returns the chromatic position of a Key relative to an octave
as a numeric value

values.name: newTone
values.comment: newTone is a helper function to create a tone
